creator: ludovic@hirlimann.net
text:
I run a snowflake proxy `snowflake-tor-2.5.1_14`. Every once in a while I discover that said proxy is no more running on the machine. Snowflake logs don't log what the issue might be.

```
root@debellum:/var/log # grep snowflake messages
Sep  5 15:04:36 debellum kernel: pid 68450 (snowflake-proxy), jid 0, uid 65534, was killed: failed to reclaim memory
```

So it seems memory is being leaked. 

Is there anything else I can add to this bug report that would be helpful for either the maintainer or for upstream?
